name: browserbase-mcp-server
title: Browserbase MCP Server
summary: Cloud browser automation for AI agents with hosted MCP access for navigation, actions, observation, and extraction.
description: Browserbase MCP Server gives AI agents a hosted browser through Model Context Protocol. It lets agents start or reuse Browserbase sessions, navigate pages, perform natural-language actions, observe actionable elements, and extract structured information from the web. The hosted Browserbase endpoint uses Streamable HTTP and Browserbase also provides an open-source npm package for self-hosted deployments.

environment_variables.name: BROWSERBASE_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Browserbase API key used by the self-hosted MCP server.

environment_variables.name: BROWSERBASE_PROJECT_ID
environment_variables.description: Optional Browserbase project ID for self-hosted usage.

environment_variables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Optional Gemini API key when configuring the self-hosted server with Gemini directly.

useCases.name: Website navigation and interaction
useCases.description: Drive a real browser to open pages, click UI elements, fill forms, and complete multi-step website workflows from an MCP client.

useCases.name: Structured web extraction
useCases.description: Extract page content and structured data from websites for research, QA, and downstream agent workflows.

useCases.name: Session-based browser automation
useCases.description: Create or reuse Browserbase sessions so agents can maintain state across navigation and action sequences.

useCases.name: Remote browser tools for AI agents
useCases.description: Provide hosted browser automation over Streamable HTTP without requiring users to run local browser infrastructure.

browserbaseApiKey.description: Authenticate to the hosted Browserbase MCP endpoint with a Browserbase API key passed as the browserbaseApiKey query parameter.
browserbaseApiKey.name: browserbaseApiKey
